zh.Dalton le Dale, Durham, England: 英國達勒姆道爾頓 勒 戴爾
zh.Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calai: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Dalton sr於大約1305年出生在英國藍卡爾比斯法姆時，他的父親Sir Robert Dalton27歲，母親Mary Elena de Latham32歲。他於1347年3月30日之後與Margery Poynings結婚。他去世於1369年在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.Dalton le Dale, Durham, England: 英国達勒姆道爾頓 勒 戴爾
zh-hans.Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calai: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Dalton sr于大约1305年出生在英国藍卡爾比斯法姆时，他的父亲Sir Robert Dalton27岁，母亲Mary Elena de Latham32岁。他于1347年3月30日之后与Margery Poynings结婚。他去世于1369年在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dalton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Dalton sr was born about 1305, in Bispham, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Robert Dalton, was 27 and his mother, Mary Elena de Latham, was 32. He married Margery Poynings after 30 March 1347. He died in 1369, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Dalton sr est né environ 1305, à Bispham, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Dalton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary Elena de Latham, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margery Poynings après 30 mars 1347. Il est décédé en 1369, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Dalton sr um 1305 in Bispham, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Dalton 27 und seine Mutter Mary Elena de Latham 32. Er hat nach 30. März 1347 Margery Poynings geheiratet. Er starb 1369 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Dalton sr è nato il circa 1305 nel Bispham, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Dalton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mary Elena de Latham, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margery Poynings dopo il 30 marzo 1347. Morì nel 1369, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Dalton srが約1305年にイギリスランカシュアイアビスファムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Daltonは27歳，母Mary Elena de Lathamは32歳であった。1347年3月30日以後にMargery Poyningsと結婚した。彼は1369年に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Dalton sr(이)가 대략 1305년 영국 랭카실르 비스프아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Dalton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Elena de Latham(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1347년 3월 30일 이후 Margery Poynings(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1369년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Dalton sr nasceu aproximadamente 1305, em Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Dalton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary Elena de Latham, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Poynings após 30 de março de 1347. Ele faleceu em 1369, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Dalton sr родился около 1305 г. в местности бисфам, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Dalton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Elena de Latham, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Poynings после 30 марта 1347 г. Он умер в 1369 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Dalton sr nació aproximadamente 1305, en Bispham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Dalton, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mary Elena de Latham, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margery Poynings después de 30 de marzo de 1347. Murió en 1369, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
